articles.description: Harry Kane is chasing Robert Lewandowski's incredible Bundesliga goal tally, while Kylian Mbappé seeks Champions League history. Here's the latest in Europe's record goal and assist tallies.

images.caption: Neither Kylian Mbappé nor Lamine Yamal are likely to break Lionel Messi's single-season goal and assist marks in LaLiga.

images.name: Inter Milan's Lautaro Martinez [1296x729]
images.caption: Lautaro Martinez easily leads the Seire A scoring chart, but he won't get near the single-season record.

images.name: Mason Greenwood aug 2025 [1296x729]
images.caption: Mason Greenwood was made to share the Ligue 1 top scorer title last season.

article.headline: Leverkusen stay in top spot with 2-1 win over Wolfsburg
article.description: Leverkusen battled to a 2-1 win over hosts VfL Wolfsburg on Saturday with goals from Frimpong and Grimaldo, to stay in top spot in the Bundesliga
article.linkText: Leverkusen beat Wolfsburg to remain in top spot

video.headline: VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen - Game Highlights
video.caption: Watch the Game Highlights from VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen, 10/21/2023
video.title: VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen - Game Highlights
video.description: Watch the Game Highlights from VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen, 10/21/2023

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen - Game Highlights) 2023/10/21 ESHEET

article.story:
Bayer Leverkusen battled to a 2-1 win over hosts VfL Wolfsburg on Saturday with goals from Jeremie Frimpong and Spaniard Alejandro Grimaldo, to stay in top spot in the Bundesliga with their seventh win in eight league matches.

Unbeaten Leverkusen are on 22 points, one ahead of second-placed VfB Stuttgart, 3-0 winners at Union Berlin, and two ahead of champions Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Xabi Alonso's team have now won 10 of their 11 matches in all competitions this season.

"Today it was a very strong win for us. Wolfsburg had won all their home games. We had chances to score a third goal," said Spaniard Alonso, who is already attracting interest from major European clubs.

"It is normal that we suffer a bit in the Bundesliga. But we are not stopping. We are having a good moment but there are still a lot of games to be played."

In a strong start to the game Leverkusen piled on the pressure and Frimpong was left unmarked at the far post, volleying in a Victor Boniface cross in the 13th minute to put Alonso's team in the driving seat.

Leverkusen should have scored again in the first half with chances from Boniface and Amine Adli.

Instead it was Wolfsburg who struck four minutes before the break when Leverkusen failed to clear a corner and the ball fell for Maxence Lacroix who slotted in to level.

The visitors snatched the winner just past the hour when Frimpong was sent through into the box but his cutback got a deflection with the ball landing for Grimaldo to thunder in.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.

Goal!  VfL Wolfsburg 0, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1. Jeremie Frimpong (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Victor Boniface   following a fast break.
Maximilian Arnold (VfL Wolfsburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Exequiel Palacios (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  VfL Wolfsburg 1, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1. Maxence Lacroix (VfL Wolfsburg) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Moritz Jenz   following a corner.
Ridle Baku (VfL Wolfsburg) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, VfL Wolfsburg 1, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1.
Substitution, VfL Wolfsburg. Amin Sarr replaces Tiago Tomás.
Second Half begins VfL Wolfsburg 1, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1.
Granit Xhaka (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Amine Adli (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Florian Wirtz replaces Amine Adli.
Goal!  VfL Wolfsburg 1, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 2. Álex Grimaldo (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Jeremie Frimpong.
Joakim Mæhle (VfL Wolfsburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, VfL Wolfsburg. Lovro Majer replaces Mattias Svanberg.
Jonas Hofmann (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, VfL Wolfsburg. Kevin Paredes replaces Yannick Gerhardt.
Substitution, VfL Wolfsburg. Jakub Kaminski replaces Sebastiaan Bornauw.
Edmond Tapsoba (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Nadiem Amiri replaces Jonas Hofmann.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Odilon Kossounou replaces Josip Stanisic.
Substitution, Bayer 04 Leverkusen. Nathan Tella replaces Jeremie Frimpong.
Second Half ends, VfL Wolfsburg 1, Bayer 04 Leverkusen 2.
